theme: Wire a fixed linear map with fewest additions
title: Butterfly Wiring: Minimal-Addition Straight-Line Program for a Fixed Linear Map
strategies: independent per-row dot product, one instruction per nonzero entry (trivial)
single left-to-right chain per row with exact-prefix memoization (greedy)
iterative best-shared-pair discovery across ALL rows (Boyar-Peralta-style CSE), recovering the planted butterfly/sparse-factorization structure (strong)
true minimum-addition SLP (shortest linear program) is NP-hard in general -- open ceiling, uncovered
